name: assets
description: Local or remote tmux agent dispatch — spawn, monitor, and recall long-running coding agents in dedicated tmux windows. SSH socket-forwarding for remote dispatch, configurable launcher map, harness-emitted lifecycle signals (boot / turn_end / exit + activity-mtime) on the claude-family path, signal-file completion + no-progress heartbeat fallback for non-claude, and PR-completion + subagent-peek health checks.
